name: Breeze Airways

carryOn.notes: Carry-on included with Nice and Nicer fare bundles. Personal item always included.

premiumEconomy.notes: First bag included with Nice fare.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Breeze include free bags?
faqs.answer: Nice fares include one carry-on and one checked bag. Nicer fares include two checked bags. 'Niceest' includes the most allowance.

faqs.question: What is Breeze Airways' carry-on size?
faqs.answer: Carry-on bags must be 22 x 14 x 9 inches and weigh no more than 35 lbs.
